name: Gorton's New England Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Milk, Salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams.
2. Cook the onion in butter until softened.
3. Add the diced potatoes and clam juice, then cook until the potatoes are tender.
4. Stir in the clams and milk.
5. Heat through and season with salt and pepper to taste. Do not boil.
Yield: 4 servings
